# agent-blueprints

> An architecture-first guide to designing LLM workflow and agent systems.
> Catalogs framework-agnostic cognitive shapes (patterns, primitives, modifiers)
> that downstream tools (agent-scaffold, agent-deployments) consume to
> generate production-shaped recipes. Entry counts vary as the catalog grows —
> read patterns-catalog.yaml for the live numbers.

This repo is the first stop in a three-repo pipeline: **agent-blueprints → agent-deployments → agent-scaffold → running agent.** Cognitive patterns live here. Operational concerns (auth, rate limiting, observability) live in `agent-deployments`. The CLI generator that consumes both lives in `agent-scaffold`.

## Machine-readable index

- [patterns-catalog.yaml](patterns-catalog.yaml): canonical catalog (schema v2) of every pattern + primitive + modifier
- [PATTERNS_CATALOG_SCHEMA.md](PATTERNS_CATALOG_SCHEMA.md): catalog schema reference
- [taxonomy.yaml](taxonomy.yaml): cohort declarations (single source of truth for `patterns/`, `primitives/`, `modifiers/`)

## Guides

- [agents.md](agents.md): how AI tools should consume this repo
- [README.md](README.md): repo overview + three-repo ecosystem
- [meta/HOW_TO_ADD_AN_ENTRY.md](meta/HOW_TO_ADD_AN_ENTRY.md): contributor walkthrough (including Claude Code / Cursor / Copilot prompts)

## Optional

- [foundations/choosing-a-pattern.md](foundations/choosing-a-pattern.md): the three-step picker (pattern → primitives → modifiers)
- [composition/blueprints-to-deployments.md](composition/blueprints-to-deployments.md): which deployment recipes use which entries
